codeReview.summary: The feature largely delivers the intended remote-only lightwalletd wiring, connectivity probe, and health/config surfacing, but it introduces a blockingly brittle startup test that overfits the exact SSH tunnel command string instead of the required behavior.

issues.description: The test hard-codes the exact `start: ssh -f -N -L 3184:127.0.0.1:9067 bettervps` manifest line, so any legitimate startup hardening (for example, prepending a port cleanup step while still using the same SSH tunnel and still avoiding local Zcash infrastructure) will fail this feature's test even though the required remote-only behavior remains correct. That makes the validation coverage fragile rather than behavior-based. Evidence: the test asserts the full command string at lines 15-18 instead of checking for the presence of the SSH forward arguments and absence of local `zebrad`/`lightwalletd`/`zcashd` startup commands.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, skill file, AGENTS guidance, services manifest, and library notes. The implementation satisfies the core remote-connectivity intent, but the exact-string startup test introduced a blocking review issue because it is too brittle to safely protect the intended behavior over time.
